rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies that `@[simp]` on `includeRight_apply` (proof `rfl`) causes simp to eagerly unfold `includeRight` before the characteristic lemmas `counit_includeRight`, `comul_includeRight`, `antipode_includeRight`, and `map_includeRight` can fire, rendering them dead in typical `simp` calls — confirmed directly from the diff. Review 2 erroneously approves, claiming simp annotations are correctly placed, missing this real API usability defect.
